commit.message:
feat(gpu): add full 1/6/12/24h stats for temp, power, PCIe and unified-memory support

- What: Add PCIe TX/RX history (RingBuffer + TimeWindowAggregator) to
  GpuHistory, recording per-tick throughput when available.
- What: Expand GPU Detail stats to 2 lines per time window showing:
  util avg/max, temp avg/max, mem avg/max, power avg/max with cumulative
  energy (kWh), and PCIe TX/RX avg/max (discrete GPUs only).
- What: Handle unified-memory GPUs (DGX Spark GB10, GH200) where NVML
  reports utilization_memory=0% and mem_clock=N/A. Uses known-specs
  lookup table for theoretical bandwidth and shows "no HW counter"
  instead of misleading 0 GB/s.
- What: Add memory_type_label() for unified-memory type identification
  (LPDDR5X/LPDDR5/LPDDR4x).
- What: Update README with expanded GPU monitoring metrics.
- Why: Provide complete historical analysis of GPU thermal/power/PCIe
  behavior and honest bandwidth reporting on unified-memory architectures.

Tests: cargo fmt, clippy, test all pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix booking tenant: explicit tenantId query overrides session

When URL has an explicit tenantId query param, skip injecting
x-session-tenant-id from admin session cookie. This prevents
admin session (tenant A) from overriding the booking page's
requested tenant (e.g. default), which caused menu/staff/settings
to always show tenant A's data regardless of URL.

commit.message:
fix: normalize sprite names and add diagonal bitmask masking

Fixes incorrect tile placement in the terrain test canvas caused by two
issues: (1) mixed sprite naming conventions (grass-*, tile_X_Y, t_X_Y)
where only t_X_Y exists in the auto-generated sprite maps, and
(2) irrelevant diagonal neighbors producing different bitmask values for
the same visual pattern, causing lookup misses that fell back to the
default center sprite.

- Normalize all sprite names to t_col_row format in both config files
- Add maskIrrelevantDiagonals() to test canvas, config generation, and
  production Autotiler so diagonal bits are cleared when adjacent
  cardinals are absent
- Regenerate terrain-bitmask.json with masked bitmask indices
- Add rendering fallback that parses t_X_Y to compute sprite coordinates
  when sheet.sprites lookup fails
- Fix btn-add-terrain to use t_1_1 instead of type + '-center'
- Add normalize-sprite-names.js and regenerate-bitmask-config.js scripts

Fix shift timing: handle after-midnight venues and demand curve thresholds

  (e.g. Delilah venues: 23->2AM, Poppy: 23->3AM, Harriets: 23->midnight)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix G1 arm rendering: enable Fabric for PhysX→Renderer sync

Root cause: use_fabric=False prevented the renderer from receiving
physics updates. PhysX simulation ran correctly (EEF observations
changed) but Fabric render bridge was disabled, so replicator cameras
saw only the frozen initial USD state.

Changes:
- Remove use_fabric=False (Fabric now default True)
- Replace direct PhysX joint manipulation with env.step() EEF actions
- Add runtime Fabric status verification and render validation
- Add episode termination detection logging
- Mount test script in docker-compose.g1.yml

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add admin reply system, cleanup cron, and moderation features

1. SCHEMA CHANGES (prisma/schema.prisma):
   - Added adminReply, adminReplyAt to CommunityReport
   - Added isVisible, isSpam for moderation
   - Applied with: npx prisma db push

2. NEW CRON - Cleanup (src/app/api/cron/cleanup/route.ts):
   - Delete observations older than 7 days
   - Delete CommunityReport older than 90 days (without comments)
   - Auto-resolve incidents OPEN for more than 48h
   - Scheduled: 0 3 * * * (daily at 3am)

3. NEW ENDPOINTS - Console Admin:
   - POST /api/console/comments/reply - Add admin reply to comment
   - POST /api/console/comments/moderate - Hide/show/spam/delete comments

4. UPDATED ENDPOINTS:
   - GET /api/console/comments - Include adminReply, adminReplyAt, isVisible, isSpam
   - GET /api/console/stats - Add totalComments, pendingComments counts

5. FRONTEND CHANGES (src/app/[serviceSlug]/page.tsx):
   - Filter isVisible=true comments only
   - Display admin replies with blue styling
   - Show "🛡️ DownForAI Team" label for official responses

6. VERCEL CONFIG (vercel.json):
   - Added cleanup cron to schedule

feat(git-workflow): update submit to commit before push, guard against main

- Commit staged changes before pushing (asks user for message)
- If on main branch, follow start command flow to create a feature/bugfix
  branch first, then proceed with submit
- Never commit or push directly to main

commit.message:
Replace free-text incident name with category dropdown + identifier

- Add IncidentCategory enum with 15 standard DROMIC categories
- Add category/identifier columns to incidents table with data migration
- Compose incident name server-side from category label + optional identifier
- Update Create/Edit forms with category dropdown and identifier text field
- Always show signatory placeholders in print template when names not set
- Fix pre-existing display name test expectations to match actual behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: demo readiness — auth, tenant isolation, receipt security, principle keys

Security:
- Protect /api/webhooks at mount point (was fully unauthenticated)
- Block X-Tenant-ID header escalation: non-admin users requesting a different
  tenant than their JWT now receive 403; optionalAuth path also tightened
- Tenant-scope receipt reads in trust.routes.ts (GET by hash and by session)
- webhook.routes.ts getTenantId now reads req.tenant set by protect middleware

Demo auth:
- demo/page.tsx requests guest token with tenantId=demo-tenant query param
- auth.routes.ts /guest route honours demo-tenant only when ENABLE_DEMO_MODE
  is set or NODE_ENV !== production; stores tenant_id on user + JWT

Demo data:
- demo/core.routes.ts: trustScore now 0-10, principleScores now 0-10 with
  ethics key replacing override; complianceRate and riskScore rescaled
- demo/entities.routes.ts: agent and tenant queries scoped to demo tenant

Data quality:
- receipts.routes.ts: accept did:sonate, did:web, and did:key DID formats
- live-metrics.service.ts: rename override → ethics in interface, cache,
  baseline, calculated, and fallback score objects
- receipts/page.tsx: disable verify button and show Unsigned for receipts
  with no signature/proof instead of attempting a doomed verification call

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add Notes type, collaboration, and shared task review

- Add type column (task/note) to tasks table with 5 migrations
- Notes are never auto-archived or purged (persistent references)
- Add assignee/shared_by columns for cross-account collaboration
- New MCP tools: assign_task, review_shared_tasks
- bridge_push: cross-account push to assignee's memory-bridge repo
- bridge_pull: stage shared_tasks in pending_shared_tasks (security)
- UI: Notes tab, type dropdown, Convert context menu, [N] prefix
- Kanban: NOTE badge on cards
- Digest: filter to tasks only, --include-notes CLI flag

approval via review_shared_tasks(action="approve") before import.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: container-setup.sh use systemctl + VyOS podman storage path

VyOS runs podman with non-default --root, so plain podman commands
don't see containers. Check service state via systemctl is-active and
exec into container via CID file + explicit --root path.

Initial MVP: Neural Garden Academy

Cohort-based course platform for "Claude Code for Designers" — teaching
designers to build real products with AI.

Includes: Next.js 16 + React 19, Auth.js v5 (Google/GitHub OAuth),
Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL, tRPC 11, Stripe Checkout + webhooks,
Listmonk email capture, MDX course content, student dashboard,
admin panel (cohorts/students/stats), Docker multi-stage build,
and GitHub Actions CI/CD.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix levenshtein, OSA, and LCS distance computations to match R stringdist

Three bugs: inverted substitution cost in lv/osa (match=1→0, mismatch=0→1),
osa transposition used variable cost instead of fixed 1, lcs formula was
max(m,n)-lcs instead of m+n-2*lcs. All R ground truth values regenerated.
1314/1314 tests pass.

commit.message:
fix: handle Anthropic API credit balance error gracefully

- Add res.ok check in client before SSE parsing to catch HTTP errors
- Show user-friendly message for credit balance, overload, rate limit
- Add credit_balance error mapping in server-side resolveAnthropicError
- Prevents raw JSON error body from being displayed to users

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: emit truncation notice when reasoning exhausts token budget

When a reasoning model (DeepSeek-R1) uses all max_tokens in its
thinking phase without producing </think>, the user previously saw
a blank response. Now emits a content chunk with a notice to increase
max_tokens, so the response is never empty.

fix: deduplicate search results, resolve doc titles in search/stance, preserve FTS5 wildcard (#10)

- P0: Add deduplicateResults() to search-legislation and build-legal-stance,
  fetch limit*2 rows then deduplicate by document_title + provision_ref
- P1: Preserve trailing * in sanitizeFtsInput() for FTS5 prefix search
- P1: Import and use resolveDocumentId in search/stance for document_id param
- P2: Add query_strategy: 'broadened' to _metadata when falling back to
  broader FTS variants; add 'like_fallback' for LIKE tier
- CI: Add note? and query_strategy? to ResponseMetadata interface

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch Grafana to hostNetwork (WSL2 Cilium NodePort workaround), sync Cilium nodePort range

Cilium eBPF NodePort doesn't work on WSL2 kernels — TC hooks can't DNAT
on virtual interfaces. Grafana now uses hostNetwork with GF_SERVER_HTTP_PORT=38888.
Also align Cilium nodePort.range (30000-40000) with k3s service-node-port-range.

commit.message:
Replace generic size selector with 5 distinct body type silhouettes

Each body type gets a unique SVG silhouette:
- Timglas (Hourglass): wide shoulders, very narrow waist, wide hips
- Rektangel (Rectangle): straight vertical sides, minimal curves
- Päron (Pear): narrow shoulders, dramatically wide hips/thighs
- Rund (Apple): round midsection that's wider than shoulders
- V-form (Inverted triangle): wide shoulders tapering to narrow hips

Body type selector is now the primary control (prominent pills).
Size selector (XS–XXL) is secondary – scales the chosen silhouette's width.
All 5 SVGs use the same zone Y-coordinates so clothing placement is consistent.

commit.message:
fix(ticket): rm -rf + worktree prune after removing out-of-repo worktree

git worktree remove --force can leave the directory behind and stale
refs in git's worktree list. Now also rm -rf the path and runs
git worktree prune so worktree-create sees a clean slate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(Matching): 缩放路径三项细节对齐 — startLevel 上调 + NMS 桶消费 + key 量化

1. subPixel=3 (LeastSquaresHigh) startLevel 上调逻辑同步到缩放入口
   (反编译: if v35==3 && startLevel<=0 && levels>1 则 startLevel+=1)
2. SpatialNMSCluster 邻域收集后清空桶 (posMap.erase)，防止同一 match
   被后续局部峰重复处理，对齐反编译 sub_18004B100 消费语义
3. 空间 key 量化改为 truncation (int32_t cast) 对齐反编译整型 col/row 字段

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
